headline: Xiaomi holds the crown; StepFun hits new heights
summary: Xiaomi's mimo-v2.5 keeps its iron grip at 17.3% token share, while StepFun's step-3.7-flash just posted an all-time high of 5.1%—a remarkable climb from rank 14 just a month ago. DeepSeek remains a close second at 10.1%, but the real story is StepFun's relentless ascent and Tencent's hy3 breaking through with a fresh all-time record of 7.9%.
highlights: Xiaomi: 17.3% share, still untouchable after 30 days of gains (+7.0%)
StepFun hits all-time high: 5.1% share, up 7 ranks in a week alone
Tencent hy3 breaks record: 7.9% share on debut week
DeepSeek holds #2 with 10.1%, both flash and pro variants climbing
Anthropic slides: down 1.6 percentage points month-over-month to 10.5%
Moonshot AI surges: kimi-k2.6 jumps 10 ranks in a day, now #22
Poolside laguna-s debuts at #29 with a 14-rank jump in 24 hours
OpenAI gpt-5.5 in freefall: down 21 ranks in 30 days to #34
